quote: The path of the righteous man is beset on all sides by the inequities of the selfish and the tyranny of evil men.
description: Samuel L. Jackson delivers the iconic Ezekiel 25:17 monologue before the diner shootout in Pulp Fiction.

quote: Don't you hate that? Uncomfortable silences.
description: Travolta and Uma Thurman do the twist at Jack Rabbit Slim's in Pulp Fiction.

quote: dun dun DUUUN
description: The dramatic prairie dog slow-turn — one of the internet's most iconic reaction clips.

quote: Charlie bit me! And that really hurt Charlie!
description: The classic British baby viral — Charlie bites his brother's finger, twice, with escalating drama.

quote: LEAVE BRITNEY ALONE! Leave her alone right now!
description: Chris Crocker's tearful 2007 bedroom breakdown defending Britney Spears — proto-stan culture.

quote: Is this real life? Is this going to be forever?
description: Seven-year-old David is completely bewildered coming out of dental anesthesia.

quote: Double rainbow all the way across the sky! What does it mean?!
description: The auto-tuned double rainbow song remix — the peak of early YouTube musical meme culture.

quote: Here we are now, entertain us.
description: Nirvana's Smells Like Teen Spirit music video — the grunge generation's anthem.

quote: Fuck you, I won't do what you tell me!
description: Rage Against the Machine's explosive Killing In the Name music video — political fury at full volume.

quote: This is what you get when you mess with us.
description: Radiohead's Karma Police video — a man being chased by a car in reverse, hauntingly iconic.

quote: She looks like the real thing. She tastes like the real thing.
description: Radiohead's melancholy Fake Plastic Trees from The Bends era — early alt-rock perfection.

quote: You are not your job. You're not how much money you have in the bank.
description: Tyler Durden's anti-consumerist manifesto speech from Fight Club.

quote: All those moments will be lost in time, like tears in rain.
description: Roy Batty's final tears-in-rain monologue — perhaps the most beautiful death scene in cinema.

quote: There is no spoon.
description: The Matrix lobby shootout sequence — Neo and Trinity unload on slow-motion security guards.

quote: Dodge this.
description: The Matrix's iconic bullet-time rooftop sequence — Neo bends backward dodging bullets.

quote: Must go faster!
description: The T-Rex jeep chase from Jurassic Park — pure Spielberg adrenaline.

quote: I need your clothes, your boots, and your motorcycle.
description: The T-1000 liquid metal morphing sequence from Terminator 2.

quote: Coffee is for closers only.
description: Alec Baldwin's volcanic always-be-closing motivational speech from Glengarry Glen Ross.

quote: BOHEMIAN RHAPSODY!
description: Wayne and Garth headbang to Bohemian Rhapsody in the Mirth Mobile — the ultimate car scene.

quote: Life moves pretty fast. If you don't stop and look around once in a while, you could miss it.
description: Ferris hijacks the Von Steuben parade float and performs Twist and Shout.

quote: Wanna hear the most annoying sound in the world? EEEEHHH!
description: Jim Carrey and Jeff Daniels perform the most annoying sound in the world.

quote: Dead or alive, you're coming with me.
description: RoboCop's entrance — the birth of one of 80s sci-fi's most iconic characters.

quote: I'm Ron Burgundy. Go fuck yourself, San Diego.
description: All the San Diego news teams collide in an absurd street brawl in Anchorman.

quote: They've gone to plaid!
description: Dark Helmet engages ludicrous speed and goes to plaid in Mel Brooks' Spaceballs.

quote: I have had it with these motherf***ing snakes on this motherf***ing plane!
description: Samuel L. Jackson delivers the internet's most requested movie line.

quote: DING DING ding-ding DING...
description: Crazy Frog's Axel F — the ringtone that colonized every Nokia in 2005.

quote: Shun the nonbeliever! Shuuunnnn!
description: Charlie the Unicorn gets dragged to Candy Mountain — classic early Flash animation.

quote: WHASSUP?!
description: The original Budweiser Whassup! commercial — the ad catchphrase that defined the early 2000s.

quote: No. I am your father.
description: The Empire Strikes Back's galaxy-shattering paternity reveal — cinema's most famous plot twist.

quote: I did not hit her! It's not true! It's bullshit! I did naaaht! Oh hi Mark.
description: Tommy Wiseau's legendary non-sequitur transition from meltdown to casual greeting.

quote: Fighting evil by moonlight, winning love by daylight!
description: The original Sailor Moon anime opening — pure 90s magical girl nostalgia.

quote: I can't even say hello without screwing it up!
description: Jack Rebney's legendary angry RV salesman outtakes — the pre-YouTube viral video from VHS tape trading.

quote: That was an order! Steiner's attack was an order!
description: The original Downfall bunker breakdown scene that spawned a thousand parody subtitles.

quote: Like a glove!
description: Ace Ventura's triumphant parking declaration — Jim Carrey at full rubber-face chaos.

quote: Fight Club without Tyler Durden.
description: The viral Fight Club minus Tyler Durden edit — makes the narrator look completely deranged.

quote: The bond that lasts a lifetime.
description: Budweiser's 2014 Super Bowl Puppy Love ad — the golden lab and Clydesdale friendship.

quote: Hasta la vista, baby.
description: T-800 shoots liquid nitrogen-frozen T-1000, shattering him into glittering fragments.

quote: Nailed it.
description: 50+ hilarious fail compilation — the eternal genre of people miscalculating physics.

quote: Vrei să pleci dar nu mă, nu mă iei!
description: O-Zone's official Dragostea Din Tei video — the Romanian bubblegum pop that conquered the web.

quote: I'm fuzzy on the whole good/bad thing.
description: The Stay Puft Marshmallow Man scene — the most harmless thing Ray could think of.

quote: This is the weapon of a Jedi Knight.
description: The evolution of all Star Wars lightsaber duels — from Vader vs Obi-Wan to Darth Maul.

quote: Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to the Tonight Show!
description: Conan O'Brien's debut on The Tonight Show — a historic late-night handoff.

source.title: The Tonight Show with Conan O'Brien

quote: Change my pitch up. Smack my bitch up.
description: The Prodigy's banned first-person-perspective music video — pure 90s rave chaos.

quote: The mountain doesn't care.
description: Oscar-nominated Sundance Special Jury Prize winner — two boys' dangerous power game spirals near a surface mine.

quote: He dances his grief at his mother's funeral.
description: Sundance Grand Jury Prize short — a cop's raw improvised eulogy collapses into a full dance breakdown.

quote: A squirrel conducts the woodland orchestra.
description: Breathtaking CGI animation by Illogic — woodland creatures stage a full Bellini opera in a moonlit forest.

quote: The frogs own the pool now.
description: Oscar-nominated photorealistic CGI — frogs frolic through an abandoned luxury mansion with a dark twist ending.

quote: She swallows herself whole.
description: Vimeo Best of Year 2022 — Renee Zhan's mesmerizing stop-motion about a woman who falls in love with her own void.

quote: The rats are running and they don't know why.
description: Viral Steve Cutts animation — a rat's endless consumerist quest for happiness set to The Rolling Stones.

quote: Second best is never enough.
description: Award-winning stop-motion comedy — when Herman becomes the world's oldest man, his brother schemes to steal the title.

quote: He came back different.
description: Oscar-nominated drama — a son returns to rural Tunisia with a veiled wife, igniting his father's darkest fears.

quote: A boy is caught between two worlds.
description: Oscar winner Best Live Action Short 2019 — a hate crime transforms a young boy's world in rural America.

quote: Life in New York is one long ironic joke.
description: Vimeo Staff Pick Premiere — Amy Nicholson's hilarious highlight reel of ironic street moments from decades of New York living.

quote: I quit social media for exactly forty-eight hours.
description: SXSW 2018 comedy — Mackenzie Davis quits her phone and promptly discovers there's no escaping the screen.

quote: Nobody knows what happened up there.
description: Dark comedy thriller — mountaineers search for a missing comrade in a blizzard with increasingly unhinged results.

quote: What they did to him in that parking lot.
description: Sundance Grand Jury Prize winner — a man wakes up after a parking lot attack to find himself in a deeply bizarre situation.

quote: Ninety-six bystanders. Zero heroes.
description: Golden Bear winner Berlinale — Ruben Östlund's one-take recreation of a real Stockholm bank robbery with 96 choreographed performers.

quote: Can you give me something more... authentic?
description: Slamdance Grand Jury Prize comedy — a voiceover recording session for a children's ice cream ad spirals into complete chaos.

source.title: No Other Way to Say It

quote: Everyone thinks he's a gnome.
description: Dutch absurdist comedy — a tall man discovers the entire world perceives him as a mythological gnome.

quote: An egg, a cup of coffee, and a very complicated situation.
description: Vimeo Best of Comedy nominee 2018 — Noah Malone's absurdist animation about a couple trapped beneath a rare bird's egg.

quote: Craig absolutely loses it in the most relatable way.
description: Vimeo Staff Pick comedy by Graham Parkes — a man has a very public, very pathetic, deeply human meltdown.

quote: Art school was supposed to be different.
description: BAFTA-winning Vimeo Staff Pick Premiere — Jonathan Hodgson's raw animated memoir of 1980s Liverpool student life.

quote: Waiting in the fluorescent light.
description: SXSW 2020 Staff Pick Premiere by Daniel Newell Kaufman — a mother and child suspended in limbo at a grimy bus station.

quote: Navigating love while the system takes him away.
description: Sundance jury award documentary by Garrett Bradley — the silent struggle of a woman whose partner is incarcerated.

quote: A love story between bears.
description: 2010 Vimeo Award Best Animation winner by Eran Hilleli — gorgeous experimental 3D animated love story.

quote: What would you do with a hole that goes through anything?
description: Viral office comedy — a sleep-deprived worker discovers a black hole and immediately makes terrible decisions.

quote: If I can live and breathe and be happy and find joy in my work, then I think that's enough.
description: Mickey Smith's iconic 2010 surf film — Vimeo all-time top ten, poetic 16mm photography of the wild Atlantic.

quote: A high school love triangle involving a gorilla.
description: Vimeo Best Music Video of 2015 — CANADA's surreal VFX-packed video for Tame Impala's The Less I Know The Better.

source.title: Tame Impala: The Less I Know the Better

quote: She drifts through a monster truck rally dreaming.
description: Iconic 2012 music video by Emily Kai Bock — Grimes floats ethereally through hyper-masculine spaces, shot on 35mm.

quote: Fleeting moments of movement and melancholy.
description: Vimeo Best Music Videos pick — Camille Summers-Valli's experimental film for BADBADNOTGOOD, inspired by Muybridge.

quote: All feminine hell breaks loose.
description: Vimeo Best of Year 2022 — C. Prinz directs Doechii's explosive, confrontational music video.

quote: A dancer loops forever between obsession and release.
description: Spotify-commissioned hypnotic music video for Mitski's A Pearl, directed by Saad Moosajee and Danaé.

quote: Welcome to the city of your dreams.
description: Vimeo Staff Pick — stunning 4K drone cinematography over Los Angeles, the city as an endless aerial reflection.

quote: The last unridden spines in the Saint Elias mountains.
description: Vimeo Best Action Sports nominee — Sherpas Cinema and The North Face's epic ski/snowboard film on Alaska's Tsirku Glacier.

quote: My hair is leaving and I must follow it into the void.
description: César-nominated animated short by Paul Cabon — a man's surreal journey into his bald future, from tiger jungles to spiritual awakening.

quote: We are all one.
description: Oscar-nominated live action short — Muslim passengers protect Christians during an al-Shabaab bus attack in Kenya.

quote: She ran away from home and found something worse and better.
description: Award-winning Vimeo Staff Pick animated feature — Tomek Popakul's gritty psychedelic rave-world Eastern European odyssey.

quote: The buffalo of pure violence rises from blood.
description: Vimeo Staff Pick Premiere — Lorenz Wunderle's psychedelic animated revenge tale of a coyote hunting the wolves who killed his family.

quote: Did I leave the stove on?
description: Multi-award winning animated short by Frederic Siegel — a man haunted by OCD intrusive thoughts on his commute, rendered in three colors.

quote: From a seed to war, from meat to love, from indifference to apocalypse.
description: Swiss stop-motion montage by Fabio Friedli — 3,000 images condense all of human existence in under 5 minutes.

quote: Pombo was never just a character.
description: Sundance and SXSW animation winner — a father haunted by his past life as an 80s TV mascot must face who he really is.

quote: Among the urban chaos, something alive and moving.
description: Oscar-nominated 2021 animated short by Adrien Merigeau — a loner sees the city itself become a psychedelic spiritual guide.

quote: Animals in their natural concert hall.
description: Earlier Illogic animation study — photo-real woodland animals in a silent nocturnal performance, a precursor to Maestro.

quote: Hello. I am a clone of you.
description: Don Hertzfeldt's Oscar-nominated World of Tomorrow teaser — a girl is visited by her own clone from the far future.

quote: The absent destinations of David Prime.
description: Clip from Don Hertzfeldt's World of Tomorrow Episode Three — existential sci-fi animation from one of Vimeo's most celebrated creators.

quote: How six students made an Oscar-nominated film.
description: Behind-the-scenes of Garden Party — the making of Illogic's Oscar-nominated frog animation by six French students at MoPA.

quote: Life, death, and everything in between drawn on walls.
description: Blu's viral stop-motion graffiti masterpiece — the entire history of life animated across city walls in real locations.

quote: This is what the inside of a projector dreams about.
description: Vimeo cult classic abstract visual — hypnotic experimental film that mimics a broken film projector.

quote: The corrugated spines have never been skied.
description: Director's cut of the Tsirku glacier expedition — uncut lines down Alaska's most remote snowboard terrain.

quote: Sometimes love is complicated.
description: Later section of Eran Hilleli's Between Bears — the emotional crescendo of the 2010 Vimeo Best Animation winner.

quote: Walk on by — Dionne Warwick understands New York.
description: Closing sequence of Irony — Amy Nicholson's New York vignettes build to their Dionne Warwick crescendo.

quote: More ice cream. Less screaming.
description: Peak chaos moment from No Other Way to Say It — the voiceover session reaches complete unhinged meltdown.

source.title: No Other Way to Say It

quote: This is for you, Mom.
description: The full dance sequence from Thunder Road — Jim Arnaud's magnificent, heartbreaking, unscripted eulogy dance.

quote: The rave never ends in post-industrial Poland.
description: Rave sequence from Acid Rain — Tomek Popakul's psychedelic animated long-take of Eastern European club culture.

quote: He found it at the mall.
description: Shopping mall sequence from Happiness — Steve Cutts shows rats consuming themselves to exhaustion in 1920s cartoon style.

quote: The wolves came at dawn.
description: Opening massacre from Coyote — Lorenz Wunderle's brutal, gorgeous psychedelic animated sequence.

quote: Cold water, dark rooms, and a life worth living.
description: Mid-film meditation from Dark Side of the Lens — Mickey Smith underwater, narrating a life spent in Atlantic surf.

quote: She's invisible in the loudest room.
description: Monster truck stadium sequence from Grimes Oblivion — Claire Boucher dreaming in the middle of the male gaze.
